title: Baking & Desserts
description: Sweet treats, classic bakes and festive favorites. Click on a recipe to view the full instructions.

title: Easy Recipes
description: Easy-to-make recipes that require little effort, even if they take a bit more time in the oven. As a mom of young children, I don't always have the energy to cook elaborate meals, but I still try to serve my kids (semi) healthy and varied dishes. These recipes are some of the easy, low-effort meals that help me do just that.

title: Main Dishes
description: Hearty meals, comforting classics and flavorful dishes.

title: Quick & Easy
description: Fast, tasty and effortless meals. Sometimes I simply don't have the time or energy to put a lot of effort into cooking, but I still want to serve something delicious without spending too long in the kitchen. These recipes are quick to prepare, easy to follow, and perfect for busy days when you want something good on the table with minimal effort.

title: Slow & Special
description: Slow-cooked dishes full of depth and flavor.

title: Wild Game
description: Rustic, bold and flavorful dishes made with wild game.
